title: Figma

description: Vector-based design and prototyping tool for creating wireframes, mockups, and interactive experiences.

title: Coolors

description: Comprehensive CSS reference and guides maintained by Mozilla for web developers of all levels.

description: Articles, guides, and tips covering every aspect of CSS — from flexbox to grid to animations.

description: Practical, modern CSS techniques for common layout and styling challenges in web design.

description: Visual CSS layout generator for Grid and Flexbox — pick a template, tweak the settings, and copy the code.

description: The modern JavaScript tutorial — from fundamentals to advanced topics with clear, in-depth explanations.

description: Authoritative JavaScript reference including APIs, syntax, and best practices from Mozilla.

description: Official React docs with interactive examples, API reference, and guides for building component-driven UIs.

title: Manus
description: Autonomous AI agent that independently browses the web, writes code, and completes complex multi-step tasks end-to-end.

description: Fast color scheme generator — create, explore, and export beautiful palettes with one keypress.
